description_long: This is a stylized adult pedestrian figure with a youthful appearance, featuring a medium build and standing in a neutral pose with arms slightly outstretched. The figure is dressed in a tunic with short sleeves, belted at the waist, and fitted pants tucked into mid-calf boots. Accessories include a crossbody strap, a bracer on one forearm, and a pouch attached to the belt, suggesting a practical, adventure-ready outfit. The character's hair is medium-length and tied back in a loose ponytail, with layered bangs framing the face. The overall design is reminiscent of a fantasy or adventure game character, with detailed sculpting on the clothing and accessories. The surface finish is matte, with visible seams and folds in the garments, and the figure appears to be made primarily of painted plastic or resin.
description: A stylized adult figure in a tunic, boots, and accessories, standing upright with a ponytail and adventure-themed outfit. The character has a detailed, matte finish and a practical, fantasy-inspired appearance.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back of the tunic, crossbody strap, and ponytail, with boots and belt details visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, arm bracer, and the pouch on the hip.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the facial features, layered bangs, tunic details, and both arms slightly outstretched.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the crossbody strap, belt, and the side profile of the boots and tunic.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeve tunic with belt, fitted pants, mid-calf boots, crossbody strap, and forearm bracer
attribute_hairstyle: medium-length hair tied in a loose ponytail with layered bangs
